title: Who is Neelkanth Mishra? Economist appointed as Executive Director at the World Bank
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Neelkanth Mishra, an economist, is the subject of the news.
*   He has been appointed to a new position.
*   His new role is Executive Director at the World Bank.

title: RBI Monetary Policy Committee LIVE: Governor announces host of measures to boost forex inflow and reserves
content:
The RBI Governor has announced a set of measures.
*   The primary objective of these measures is to boost foreign exchange (forex) inflow.
*   They are also aimed at increasing India's forex reserves.

title: RBI MPC keeps repo rate unchanged at 5.25%, for second time in row, amid West Asia crisis
content:
The RBI's Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) has kept the repo rate unchanged.
*   The repo rate remains at 5.25% for the second consecutive time.
*   This decision was made amidst the ongoing West Asia crisis.

title: Rupee rises 11 paise to 95.63 against U.S. dollar ahead of RBI policy decision
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Rupee has appreciated by 11 paise against the U.S. dollar.
*   Its current exchange rate stands at 95.63 per U.S. dollar.
*   This rise occurred ahead of the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) upcoming policy decision.

title: Stock markets climb ahead of RBI’s monetary policy decision
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Stock markets are experiencing an upward climb.
*   This positive movement is occurring ahead of the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) scheduled monetary policy decision.
*   The market's rise likely reflects investor anticipation or optimism regarding the upcoming policy announcement.

title: RBI issues compounding order for FEMA violations in Myntra Designs case
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has taken action against Myntra Designs.
*   This action is in response to violations of the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) by the company.
*   The specific "compounding order" indicates a process for settling the violations, typically involving a penalty or fine, without a full court proceeding.

title: Stock markets end flat ahead of RBI's monetary policy decision
content:
Stock markets concluded the day with minimal change, largely remaining flat.
*   This stable performance reflects a cautious "wait-and-see" approach from investors.
*   Markets are awaiting the upcoming monetary policy decision from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
